data.body:
Goal:
Fix Foolery's Codex adapter so live Codex JSON-RPC text and command output are visible instead of collapsing into empty Detail lines. Use the live adrian evidence from /home/cartine/.config/foolery/logs/foolery/2026-04-25/term-1777101921516-37ganw.jsonl, where item/agentMessage/delta and item/commandExecution/outputDelta carry content in params.delta.

Verification:
1. Add focused automated tests that feed Codex JSON-RPC item/agentMessage/delta with params.delta and params.text; both must normalize to equivalent non-empty stream_event text.
2. Add focused automated tests that feed item/commandExecution/outputDelta with params.delta and params.text; both must surface equivalent non-empty command output events.
3. Add a regression test for empty reasoning item/completed events so they do not render content_block_delta lines with (no text).
4. Run the targeted adapter/terminal-format tests, then bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.

Constraints:
- Keep the blast radius isolated to Codex-specific adapter paths whenever possible.
- If any shared parsing/formatting path is touched, it must support both delta and text keys equally and preserve existing behavior for Claude, OpenCode, Copilot, and Gemini.
- Treat outputDelta the same way: Codex-specific code may normalize Codex fields directly; any shared helper must accept both delta and text without privileging one.
data.title: Fix Codex adapter deltas
